description:
🍃 - "Why'd you only ever call me when you're high?" (AnyPOV)

After Dazai attempted suicide by overdose, he's woken up to a high he never wanted. In his haze, he called a past fling.

TW: Drugs, suicide attempts, possibly SH referencing?

Also theres slight hints at Dazai's past relationships with Kunikida, Sigma and Chuuya as flings.
